features: Batteries come individually sealed on a six count blister pack, ensuring a longer shelf life as well as keeping unused batteries secure and safe

For use in watches, LED lights, garage door controls, step counters, pet collars, medical devices, car keys, fobs, toys, games, computer motherboards, door bells, sporting goods, remote controllers and more
Our lightweight durable CR2032 batteries are mercury and cadmium free making them more environmentally friendly.
Always keep batteries stored in a safe place away from children and pets

DJ Battery CR2032 batteries are compatible with devices using the following batteries - ，L2032, 2032，CR2032BP，DL2032，ECR2032, BR2032，LM2032, 5004LC, 5004LB，L14，SB-T15，EA2032C，EA-2032C，DJ2032，KL2032，E- CR2032，KCR2032, KECR2032，GPCR2032，KT-CR2032 and Energizer CR2032
Engraved with battery model for quick and easy identification
description: Product Description Power Your Life with DJ Battery - Reliable Power at Affordable Prices Perfect for A Range of Products Our batteries are designed to offer unparalleled performance across a wide array of devices, ensuring that your gadgets run smoothly and efficiently. Whether you're tracking your valuables with Air tags, crunching numbers on your calculator, monitoring your health with a scale, or keeping tabs on your furry friends with pet devices, our batteries deliver the reliable power you need. Engineered for longevity, these batteries maintain consistent energy output, reducing the need for frequent replacements and ensuring that your devices remain operational whenever you need them. Choose our batteries for a dependable power source that supports your lifestyle and keeps your essential gadgets functioning at their best. Battery Specifications High capacity, long lasting, high quality standard CR2032 batteries Power Your Life Our batteries are designed to provide long-lasting power, allowing you to focus on the more important things in life without the constant concern of frequent recharging or unexpected power loss. Whether you’re embarking on a long journey, managing a busy workday, or simply enjoying time with family and friends, our reliable batteries ensure that your devices keep up with your lifestyle. With an emphasis on durability and efficiency, you can trust our batteries to deliver consistent performance, freeing you to concentrate on what truly matters. Responsible Recycling Our batteries are designed with the environment in mind, being free from harmful substances such as mercury and cadmium, however, it's important to remember that even with these improvements, responsible recycling is crucial.
